title: Starwind UI Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Starwind UI components and settings

$schema.description: The schema the configuration adheres to

css.description: Path to the Starwind CSS file

baseColor.description: Base color theme for the UI components

cssVariables.description: Whether to use CSS variables for theming. Currently only CSS variables are supported.

componentDir.description: Directory where Starwind UI components are located

utilsDir.description: Directory where Starwind UI utilities are located

components.description: List of Starwind UI components added to your project
